description: Training-signal hardening: outcome-stamped ingest + retry-collapse, per-pair LLM data judge (fail-open/closed) with manifest eval_report rollup + tier sovereignty, high-throughput judge-ranked synthesis (rejection sampling, Evol/Self-Instruct expansion, [domain] parameterization, planner modality fixes), steerable loop (absorbs track 35 nudge + data-layer allowlist + steering-compliance metric), and surgical training fixes (daemon end_task default, live calib batches, rotary kwargs). The prerequisite for lexame P2P marked-expertise sharing.
